politicians.name: Julian Reichelt
politicians.role: Media critic / NIUS editor (ex-Bild); exposed ZDF Elon Musk 'Jagd auf Migranten' lie as blatant propaganda

politicians.name: Tino Strussenberg
politicians.role: AfD politician; filed Strafanzeige against ZDF for Musk lie; supports Elon legal action

politicians.name: ZDF Heute Leadership
politicians.role: State-funded (GEZ fees) broadcaster; broadcast false claim Elon Musk 'called for hunt on migrants' (misquote of protest post); issued weak 'imprecise' correction after backlash; subject of Elon Musk lawsuit for outrageous lies
